headline: Urban Outfitters and DoorDash Partner to Bring On-Demand Style to Gen Z
summary: Urban Outfitters is thrilled to announce a nationwide partnership with DoorDash, the local commerce platform that connects consumers with the best of their neighborhoods. The partnership marks UO's expansion into on-demand retail, bringing the brand's coveted assortment to customers with greater speed and convenience.
